orchestration_contract.name: GTandDiedTooSoons OpenAI Production Orchestration
operating_assumptions: AI workers can propose musical, technical, and operational changes, but material changes must be traceable to versioned manifests or human-approved local sessions.

DAW and account automation is in scope when it uses official user-authenticated surfaces, redacts sensitive data, and honors confirmation gates for purchases, installs, Live-set mutation, export, and release.
Repository CI must verify orchestration contracts without requiring OpenAI credentials, vendor credentials, Ableton Live, Max for Live, Arturia Software Center, or private audio.
Generated prompts, briefs, and manifests must avoid raw private audio, unreleased lyrics, credentials, account tokens, installer payloads, and commercial library content.
orchestration_contract.purpose: A repeatable, auditable orchestration contract for AI-assisted Ableton Live 12 Suite, Max for Live, source-provenance, and account-authorized library operations.
